Package index

All functions

area
Area for all U.S. counties by FIPS code (excluding U.S. territories)
coc2007 coc2008 coc2009 coc2010 coc2011 coc2012 coc2013 coc2014 coc2015 coc2016 coc2017 coc2018 coc2019 coc2020 coc2021 coc2022 coc2023 coc2024 coc2025
CoC geographic boundaries, 2007-2025
coc_mergers
Continuum of Care (CoC) merger crosswalk over time
counties
U.S. county boundaries
county_coc2007 county_coc2008 county_coc2009 county_coc2010 county_coc2011 county_coc2012 county_coc2013 county_coc2014 county_coc2015 county_coc2016 county_coc2017 county_coc2018 county_coc2019 county_coc2020 county_coc2021 county_coc2022 county_coc2023 county_coc2024 county_coc2025
County to CoC area-weighted crosswalk
homeless
County-level homeless estimates, 2007-2024 (missing values imputed)
homeless_na
County-level homeless estimates, 2007-2025 (pre-imputation, with missing values)
hud2007 hud2008 hud2009 hud2010 hud2011 hud2012 hud2013 hud2014 hud2015 hud2016 hud2017 hud2018 hud2019 hud2020 hud2021 hud2022 hud2023 hud2024 hud2025
CoC-level Point-in-Time (PIT) homeless counts, 2007-2025
hud2025_prelim
Preliminary 2025 homelessness estimates (NOT official HUD data)
pit_us
National Point-in-Time homeless totals by shelter status, 2007-2025
sp_homeless
County homeless estimates as a spatial (sf) object
states
U.S. state and territory boundaries
tract_coc2007 tract_coc2008 tract_coc2009 tract_coc2010 tract_coc2011 tract_coc2012 tract_coc2013 tract_coc2014 tract_coc2015 tract_coc2016 tract_coc2017 tract_coc2018 tract_coc2019 tract_coc2020 tract_coc2021 tract_coc2022 tract_coc2023 tract_coc2024 tract_coc2025
Census tract to Continuum of Care (CoC) hard assignment crosswalk
tract_coc_wt2007 tract_coc_wt2008 tract_coc_wt2009 tract_coc_wt2010 tract_coc_wt2011 tract_coc_wt2012 tract_coc_wt2013 tract_coc_wt2014 tract_coc_wt2015 tract_coc_wt2016 tract_coc_wt2017 tract_coc_wt2018 tract_coc_wt2019 tract_coc_wt2020 tract_coc_wt2021 tract_coc_wt2022 tract_coc_wt2023 tract_coc_wt2024 tract_coc_wt2025
Tract to CoC area-weighted overlap crosswalk

Developed by Zack W. Almquist.
